citation.unstructured_citation: Anson, Chris M. "Closed Systems and Standardized Writing Tests." College Composition and Communication, vol. 60, no. 1, 2008, pp. 113-128.
Bartholomae, David. "Inventing the University." Journal of Basic Writing, vol. 5, no. 1, 1986, pp. 4-23.
Bizzell, Patricia. Academic Discourse and Critical Consciousness. University of Pittsburgh Press, 1992.
Elbow, Peter. "Reflections on Academic Discourse: How It Relates to Freshmen and Colleagues." College English, vol. 53, no. 2, 1991, pp. 135-155.
Fulkerson, Richard. "Composition at the Turn of the Twenty-First Century." College Composition and Communication, vol. 56, no. 4, 2005, pp. 654-687.
Harris, Joseph. A Teaching Subject: Composition Since 1966. Prentice Hall, 1997.
Shaughnessy, Mina P. Errors and Expectations: A Guide for the Teacher of Basic Writing. Oxford University Press, 1977.
